name: Cron miss detection — heartbeat липсва > 90 мин
precondition: Cron инсталиран и работи; heartbeat записан в health.json или DB
smoke_sql: SELECT cron_name, MAX(created_at) AS last_seen FROM cron_heartbeats GROUP BY cron_name HAVING last_seen < NOW() - INTERVAL 90 MINUTE
fail_means: Cron спрял без алерт — Тихол не знае.
